modes.description: Stable planning path for generated AGENTS.md, config, agent, and skill files.
Tracked beta path for future plugin packaging. Not selected by default.

templates.purpose: Codex-facing repository instructions generated from TapAgents metadata.
Per-agent metadata placeholder for a future renderer.
Skill entrypoint placeholder for command-style TapAgents workflows.

notes: Codex support in this slice is generated-files-only planning metadata.
Plugin beta metadata is separated from the stable default path.
This adapter does not claim live plugin parity.
